key_patterns: patch decorators for AsyncAnthropic and AsyncOpenAI
Separate model specs: claude-sonnet-4-20250514 vs gpt-4o
ISO 8601 timestamp handling with timezone awareness
iCal export verification with BEGIN:VCALENDAR markers
Score validation with assertions on score ranges
Complex vs simple text readability comparison

patterns_discovered: Extensive async/await testing with pytest.mark.asyncio throughout all test files
Dual-provider pattern with separate mocking for Anthropic and OpenAI SDKs
Integration test pattern using AsyncClient for API endpoint testing
API key validation enforced at provider initialization
Model-specific parameter handling (claude vs gpt-4o models)
Portuguese language support as first-class concern in SEO tests
Rate limit error handling as critical path test case
Date/timezone handling with explicit UTC timezone (Z suffix)
Content status prerequisites for operations (validated required for scheduling)
gotchas_discovered: RateLimitError imported from different modules (anthropic vs openai) - provider-specific handling needed
AsyncMock required for mocking async methods, not standard MagicMock
iCal export verification checks for 'Verbum' string in output - assumes specific application branding
Readability score calculation bounded to 0-100 but test uses > 70 and < 70 thresholds without intermediate validation
Schedule API requires URL-encoded query parameters (%3A for colons in timestamps)
Empty date range queries must return empty items list rather than error
Syllable counting for Portuguese is language-specific with accent character handling
Test assumes content validation status endpoint exists before scheduling can occur

Full CRUD test coverage for SEO metadata operations
Integration tests for scheduling with validation prerequisites
